name: Red Hat Certified Architect
name_ja: Red Hat認定アーキテクト

logistics.format: Aggregate credential earned by passing 5 additional Red Hat hands-on certification exams beyond the prerequisite base credential

formal: Earn one base credential: RHCE, Red Hat Certified Enterprise Microservices Developer (RHCEMD), or Red Hat Certified Cloud-native Developer (RHCCD)
Pass 5 additional Red Hat certifications from sysadmin or developer paths

evaluation.rationale: All three personas agree at this tier; rationale reflects consensus.
